summary: Watchlist Automation (P1 Roadmap) - Complete Testing. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows working correctly.

issues: Minor: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) on dashboard - not blocking but could be cleaned up

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with test@aureos.com credentials works
Backend: GET /api/watchlist/ returns watchlist items, count, unread_alerts, alerts
Backend: POST /api/watchlist/add adds asset with correct status='added'
Backend: POST /api/watchlist/add duplicate returns status='already_exists'
Backend: POST /api/watchlist/remove removes asset with status='removed'
Backend: POST /api/watchlist/remove nonexistent returns status='not_found'
Backend: POST /api/watchlist/scan scans assets (tested with scan complete)
Backend: POST /api/watchlist/alerts/mark-read returns status='ok'
Backend: GET /api/assets/search?q=AAPL returns results with symbol, name, type
Backend: GET /api/assets/search?q=bitcoin returns crypto results
Backend: GET /api/assets/search?q=EUR returns forex results
Backend: Full workflow test (Add->Get->Remove->Verify) passed
Frontend: Login and navigation to /watchlist works
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Watchlist' nav item highlighted when active
Frontend: 'Add Asset' button opens search panel with data-testid='add-asset-btn'
Frontend: Asset search shows results from global search API
Frontend: Clicking search result adds asset and shows toast notification
Frontend: Watchlist items display with symbol, name, asset_type badge, signal info
Frontend: Remove button (trash icon) removes asset and shows toast
Frontend: 'Scan All' button triggers scan (data-testid='scan-watchlist-btn')
Frontend: Empty watchlist shows empty state with 'Add Your First Asset' button
critical_code_review_comments: All CRUD endpoints return proper status fields (added, already_exists, removed, not_found)
Watchlist scan integrates with full JARVIS analysis pipeline
Frontend properly handles all states: loading, empty, populated
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Toast notifications provide user feedback for all actions
seed_data_creation: Restored BTC (Bitcoin, crypto) to watchlist after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Watchlist Automation P1 fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_watchlist_automation.py. All endpoints working: GET /api/watchlist/, POST /api/watchlist/add, POST /api/watchlist/remove, POST /api/watchlist/scan, POST /api/watchlist/alerts/mark-read. Scan endpoint can take 5-10 seconds per asset. Test user has 1 BTC entry in watchlist. Global asset search at GET /api/assets/search?q={query} returns results from Twelve Data, CoinGecko, Polygon.

mocked_components.note: Market data uses real APIs with smart fallback to generated candles when insufficient data

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All Watchlist Automation features working correctly.
